toggles_blocks.title: Toggles Blocks
toggles_blocks.description:
If true, the explosion will toggle blocks in the explosion radius.

*Introduced in version 1.21.40*

Sample values:
• breeze_wind_charge_projectile: true

knockback_scaling.title: Knockback Scaling
knockback_scaling.description:
A scale factor applied to the knockback force caused by the explosion.

*Introduced in version 1.21.40*

Sample values:
• breeze_wind_charge_projectile: 0.6
• wind_charge_projectile: 1.22

particle_effect.title: Particle Effect
particle_effect.description:
The name of the particle effect to use. The accepted strings are 'explosion', 'wind_burst', or 'breeze_wind_burst'.

*Introduced in version 1.21.40*

Sample values:
• breeze_wind_charge_projectile: breeze_wind_burst
• wind_charge_projectile: wind_burst

sound_effect.title: Sound Effect
sound_effect.description:
The name of the sound effect played when the explosion triggers.

*Introduced in version 1.21.40*

Sample values:
• breeze_wind_charge_projectile: breeze_wind_charge.burst
• wind_charge_projectile: wind_charge.burst

negates_fall_damage.title: Negates Fall Damage
negates_fall_damage.description:
Defines whether the explosion should apply fall damage negation to Players above the point of collision.

*Introduced in version 1.21.40*

Sample values:
• wind_charge_projectile: true

allow_underwater.title: Allow Underwater
allow_underwater.description:
If true, the explosion will affect blocks and entities under water.

*Introduced in version 1.21.40*

Sample values:
• breeze_wind_charge_projectile: true

breaks_blocks.title: Breaks Blocks
breaks_blocks.description: If true, the explosion will destroy blocks in the explosion radius.

causes_fire.title: Causes Fire
causes_fire.description:
If true, blocks in the explosion radius will be set on fire.

Sample values:
• fireball: true

damage_scaling.title: Damage Scaling
damage_scaling.description: A scale factor applied to the explosion's damage to entities. A value of 0 prevents the explosion from dealing any damage. Negative values cause the explosion to heal entities instead.

destroy_affected_by_griefing.title: Destroy Affected By Griefing
destroy_affected_by_griefing.description:
If true, whether the explosion breaks blocks is affected by the mob griefing game rule.

Sample values:
• ender_crystal: true

fire_affected_by_griefing.title: Fire Affected By Griefing
fire_affected_by_griefing.description:
If true, whether the explosion causes fire is affected by the mob griefing game rule.

Sample values:
• fireball: true

fuse_length.title: Fuse Length
fuse_length.description:
The range for the random amount of time the fuse will be lit before exploding, a negative value means the explosion will be immediate.

Sample values:
• tnt_minecart: 4

fuse_lit.title: Fuse Lit
fuse_lit.description:
If true, the fuse is already lit when this component is added to the entity.

Sample values:
• ender_crystal: true

max_resistance.title: Max Resistance
max_resistance.description: A blocks explosion resistance will be capped at this value when an explosion occurs.

power.title: Power
power.description:
The radius of the explosion in blocks and the amount of damage the explosion deals.

Sample values:
• breeze_wind_charge_projectile: 3
• ender_crystal: 6
• fireball: 1
